query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.location,
  p.priority,
  p.owner,
  p.stage,
  p.value,
  p.timeline,
  LEFT(p.overview, 300) as overview,
  LEFT(p.opportunityNote, 200) as opportunityNote,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.contactId) as totalContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sendReadyContacts,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(c.name, ' | ', c.roleBucket, ' @ ', c.company) END SEPARATOR '~~') as contactList
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE 
  p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND (p.location LIKE '%QLD%' OR p.location LIKE '%NT%')
  AND p.lifecycleStatus NOT IN ('stale', 'cancelled', 'completed')
  AND JSON_CONTAINS(p.matchedBusinessLines, '1')
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.location, p.priority, p.owner, p.stage, p.value, p.timeline, p.overview, p.opportunityNote
ORDER BY FIELD(p.priority, 'hot', 'warm'), p.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.location,
  p.priority,
  p.owner,
  p.stage,
  p.value,
  p.timeline,
  LEFT(p.overview, 300) as overview,
  LEFT(p.opportunityNote, 200) as opportunityNote,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.contactId) as totalContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sendReadyContacts,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(c.name, ' | ', c.roleBucket, ' @ ', c.company) END SEPARATOR '~~') as contactList
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE 
  p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND (p.location LIKE '%QLD%' OR p.location LIKE '%NT%')
  AND p.lifecycleStatus NOT IN ('stale', 'cancelled', 'completed')
  AND JSON_CONTAINS(p.matchedBusinessLines, '1')
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.location, p.priority, p.owner, p.stage, p.value, p.timeline, p.overview, p.opportunityNote
ORDER BY FIELD(p.priority, 'hot', 'warm'), p.id ASC
LIMIT 20;

rows.name: Snowy 2.0
rows.overview: Snowy 2.0 is a 2200 MW Pumped Hydro project developed by Snowy Hydro. Located in Snowy Mountains, NSW, region NSW. Status: Under Construction. Expected completion: 2029. This hydro project represents significant equipment demand during the construction phase.
rows.opportunityNote: AEMO-registered Pumped Hydro project — 2200 MW capacity. Tunnel boring and dam construction require high-volume compressed air (1000+ CFM)
rows.contactList: Marcus Ngata | operations @ Snowy Hydro~~Tristan Fennell | procurement @ Snowy Hydro~~Jose Basilio | other @ Future Generation JV~~Scott Nebauer | other @ Snowy Hydro~~Justin Armstrong | maintenance @ Future Generation JV~~Giuseppe Gulisano | other @ Future Generation JV~~Lyndon Taylor | fleet_manager @ Snowy Hydro~~Kevin Traynor | other @ Clough~~Dean Goodall | other @ Clough~~Magnus Sunde | other @ Clough~~Hassan Merhi | maintenance @ Future Generation JV

rows.name: Arrow Energy — Surat Gas Project
rows.stage: Active — 3 open, 0 awarded, 65 closed work packages
rows.overview: Major coal seam gas development in the Surat Basin, Queensland. Includes well drilling, gas processing, water treatment, and pipeline construction. Ongoing greenfield and brownfield opportunities.
rows.opportunityNote: ICN Gateway project with 68 work packages (3 open, 0 awarded). Well drilling requires high-pressure compressed air (350+ psi)
rows.contactList: NULL

rows.name: Newmont - Tanami Gold Mine - Exploration
rows.value: Confidential, part of ongoing exploration budget
rows.overview: Ongoing underground and surface diamond and RC drilling targeting extensions to the high-grade Tanami gold deposits.
rows.opportunityNote: High demand for drilling services in a remote, world-class gold camp.
rows.contactList: Ramon Arnaudez, P.Eng. | operations @ Newmont Corporation~~SAMUEL KWASI ANIMAH- MSCPM, PGDA, IMC, IAO | operations @ Newmont Corporation~~Mike W. | maintenance @ Newmont Corporation

rows.name: Toowoomba-Athol Road Upgrade
rows.overview: The Queensland Government is commencing work on the Toowoomba-Athol Road upgrade. This road is a critical freight and commuter corridor connecting Toowoomba with the state’s south-west, experiencing growing traffic volumes due to expanding towns.
rows.opportunityNote: Direct sales opportunity to the Queensland Government for road construction equipment or to contractors involved in the project. Potential for portable air compressors for various construction tasks,
rows.contactList: Louis Jooste | other @ CPB Contractors~~Padraic Callanan | other @ CPB Contractors~~Olga Zamorina | other @ CPB Contractors~~Natasha Moore | other @ CPB Contractors~~Daniel Rinehart | other @ CPB Contractors~~Jillian McGinley | other @ Acciona~~Daniel Peyre | other @ Acciona~~James Heenan | other @ Acciona~~Michael Staunton | engineering @ Acciona~~Shaun McDonnell | maintenance @ DT Infrastructure~~Wikus Viljoen | procurement @ DT Infrastructure~~Grant Langley | procurement @ DT Infrastructure~~Simon Miller | other @ DT Infrastructure~~Shannon james Clelland | site_manager @ Golding Contractors~~Salvatore Campo Hernández | plant_manager @ Acciona~~Rubén Sáiz | other @ Acciona~~Luis Francisco Bandrés De Los Reyes | other @ Acciona

rows.name: Queensland Copper Mine Off-grid Renewable Hybrid Power Plant
rows.owner: Owner of Queensland's largest proposed copper mine
rows.timeline: Long-term power purchase agreement signed, plans to build.
rows.overview: Aggreko to build Australia’s biggest off-grid renewable hybrid power facility for a large proposed copper mine in Queensland, following a long-term power purchase agreement.
rows.opportunityNote: Aggreko is the primary contractor for the hybrid power plant. Monitor for potential sub-contracting opportunities for BESS, generators, air compressors, pumps, or lighting towers, especially during th
rows.contactList: Michael Apreku ,MMP | maintenance @ Aggreko~~Scott Johnson Aggreko | other @ Aggreko~~Amna Bihery | procurement @ Aggreko~~Jason Yeh | operations @ Aggreko~~Ousmane Bousso | site_manager @ Aggreko~~Gavin Gautreau | site_manager @ Aggreko~~Oliver Black Moynihan | procurement @ Aggreko~~Daniele Morales Davide | procurement @ Aggreko~~Abdelrahman Ahmed | commercial @ Aggreko

rows.name: Townsville transport network upgrades (Stuart Drive safety upgrades and Bowen Road Bridge duplication)
rows.overview: The Queensland Government has completed major upgrades to Townsville's transport network, including safety upgrades on Stuart Drive and the duplication of the Bowen Road Bridge on the Townsville Connection Road. These works aimed to minimise disruption and maximise efficiency.
rows.opportunityNote: Project is completed, so direct sales opportunities are unlikely. However, it indicates ongoing infrastructure investment in Townsville and potential for future projects where PT equipment might be ne
rows.contactList: Elise Marley-Wallace | other @ CPB Contractors~~Jacques Le Sueur | construction_manager @ CPB Contractors~~David Long | construction_manager @ CPB Contractors

rows.name: Yarrow Gas Project
rows.overview: Red Sky and Santos have given the green light for imminent drilling at the Yarrow well.
rows.opportunityNote: Opportunity for portable air compressors for drilling operations.
rows.contactList: Charlene Howard | operations @ Red Sky~~Fabio Vianna Mendes | other @ Santos

rows.name: Callide C Unit C4 Overhaul
rows.overview: A $60 million overhaul is underway at Callide C's troubled Unit C4, which exploded in 2021 and remained offline for two years. The project aims to bring the unit back online.
rows.opportunityNote: This is a significant maintenance and repair project. While the main capital expenditure might be internal, there could be opportunities for rental equipment (generators, lighting, portable air) for t
rows.contactList: Geoffrey Eastman | engineering @ Downer Group~~Gary Freeman | maintenance @ Downer Group~~Kate Hickman | fleet_manager @ Downer Group~~Reece Smith | fleet_manager @ Downer Group~~Dinesh Pavaday | fleet_manager @ Downer Group

rows.name: Orient Silver-Indium Exploration
rows.overview: Iltani Resources has resumed exploration at its Orient silver-indium project in Queensland after the wet season. The plan involves 115 RC holes across 16,000m to infill and expand resources.
rows.opportunityNote: Immediate opportunity for portable air compressors for RC drilling. Contractor engagement for drilling services would be a key sales target.
rows.contactList: NULL

rows.name: Brisbane Stadium Redevelopment
rows.owner: Games Independent Infrastructure and Coordination Authority
rows.stage: Early Contractor Involvement (ECI) phase, two joint ventures shortlisted
rows.timeline: ECI phase commenced after a five-month assessment process
rows.overview: Two construction joint ventures have been shortlisted to deliver the new Brisbane Stadium, marking a key milestone in one of Australia’s largest upcoming infrastructure projects. The shortlisted consortia are progressing to the Early Contractor Involvement (ECI) phase.
rows.opportunityNote: This is a major infrastructure project in Queensland. Atlas Copco PT should engage with the shortlisted joint ventures for potential equipment supply (portable air, power, light, pumps) during the con
rows.contactList: Carolyn Bannister | other @ Games Independent Infrastructure and Coordination Authority~~Anil Singh | plant_manager @ Games Independent Infrastructure and Coordination Authority

rows.name: Cross River Rail
rows.stage: Active — 2 open, 8 awarded, 5 closed work packages
rows.overview: 10.2km rail line including 5.9km twin tunnels under the Brisbane River and CBD. Four new underground stations. Brisbane's biggest infrastructure project.
rows.opportunityNote: ICN Gateway project with 15 work packages (2 open, 8 awarded). Twin tunnel boring requires high-volume compressed air
rows.contactList: Anya Petrov | procurement @ Cross River Rail Delivery Authority~~Kai Tan | other @ Cross River Rail Delivery Authority

rows.name: Cairns Drinking Water Supply Upgrades (Bayview and Brinsmead Reservoirs)
rows.overview: Critical upgrades to two key water infrastructure assets in Cairns, specifically replacing the roofs of the Bayview and Brinsmead reservoirs, to safeguard drinking water supply. Contractors are already onsite.
rows.opportunityNote: Opportunity for portable air, generators, lighting towers, and pumps for construction activities. Identify specific contractors for direct sales or fleet opportunities.
rows.contactList: Aisha Al-Hajri | engineering @ Cairns Regional Council (implied)

rows.name: North Queensland Large-Scale Solar and Battery Project
rows.timeline: Preferred EPC contractor appointed, moving towards construction.
rows.overview: A major renewable energy development in North Queensland has progressed with the appointment of a preferred engineering, procurement and construction (EPC) contractor for a large-scale solar and battery project.
rows.opportunityNote: The appointment of a preferred EPC contractor makes this a 'hot' opportunity. Atlas Copco PT should identify the named EPC contractor and engage them directly for BESS, generators, portable air, light
rows.contactList: Kaiya North | other @ Unknown~~Alistair Queenslander | procurement @ Unknown~~Dr. Lakshmi Batterywala | engineering @ Unknown~~Jian Solar-Array | construction_manager @ Unknown~~Tahlia Qld-Energy | operations @ Unknown

rows.name: SAMI Bitumen Container Facility Expansion
rows.overview: Expansion of SAMI Bitumen Technologies' existing Darwin site, establishing a new bitumen container facility to improve access to high-quality bitumen for Northern Territory projects and businesses. This involves new material logistics infrastructure.
rows.opportunityNote: SAMI Bitumen Technologies is expanding its Darwin facility to improve bitumen logistics. This is a direct CAPEX opportunity for construction equipment and power solutions.
rows.contactList: NULL

rows.name: Origin/APLNG Ironbark Expansion
rows.overview: The Queensland government has approved Origin/APLNG's Ironbark expansion, which includes the drilling of 46 extra gas wells in the Surat Basin. This project is part of the larger APLNG operation.
rows.opportunityNote: 46 new gas wells will require drilling services. Portable air compressors will be needed for drilling operations. Generators for power supply at remote well sites. Pumps for water management during dr
rows.contactList: Simon Game | general_manager @ APLNG~~Ian Moran | engineering @ Origin~~Andrew Gambling | project_manager @ Origin~~Michael Brown | other @ Origin~~Rod Neale | other @ Origin~~Conal McCullough | general_manager @ Origin

rows.name: Finniss Lithium Operation - BP33 Underground Mining Project
rows.overview: Core Lithium awarded an A$274m underground mining contract to Develop Global’s subsidiary Dev Mining Services for the BP33 deposit as part of the Finniss Lithium Operation.
rows.opportunityNote: Develop Global (Dev Mining Services) is the winning contractor. Sales team should engage with them for potential equipment supply for underground mining, including portable air compressors for drillin
rows.contactList: David Andrews | general_manager @ Core Lithium~~Shaun Ryan | operations @ Core Lithium

rows.name: Finniss Lithium Project restart and underground development
rows.overview: Core Lithium has awarded a $274 million underground contract to Dev Mining Services for its Finniss Lithium Project, indicating a restart and development phase for the underground operations.
rows.opportunityNote: Dev Mining Services is a key contractor for underground mining. Atlas Copco PT can target them for portable air compressors for drilling and blasting, as well as dewatering pumps and generators for un
rows.contactList: David Andrews | general_manager @ Core Lithium~~Emma Coulthard | other @ Core Lithium~~Shaun Ryan | operations @ Core Lithium

rows.name: Hunter Valley Resort and Golf Community
rows.overview: A staged tourism, golf, and residential community in the Hunter Valley, NSW, has moved from approval into active delivery. Civil, turf, and supply packages are opening, indicating imminent construction activities.
rows.opportunityNote: High potential for portable air, generators, lighting towers, and pumps for civil contractors involved in earthworks, infrastructure, and landscaping.
rows.contactList: Jamal Al-Hamad | plant_manager @ Unknown

rows.name: Far North Queensland Highway Widening
rows.timeline: Delivery window opening soon, near-term opportunities.
rows.overview: A short, self-contained highway-widening package in tropical North Queensland is entering its delivery window, opening near-term opportunities for civil and pavement contractors.
rows.opportunityNote: Strong opportunity for portable air, generators, lighting towers, and pumps for civil and pavement contractors involved in the highway widening project.
rows.contactList: Jarrod Thompson | plant_manager @ Unknown~~Nathan McDermott | other @ Golding~~Russell Bensley | general_manager @ Golding~~Wikus Viljoen | procurement @ DT Infrastructure

rows.name: Snowy 2.0 Hydroelectric Scheme
rows.timeline: Originally due in 2024, now delayed with full commercial operation expected in late 2027
rows.overview: Australia's most ambitious renewable energy project, a pumped-hydro expansion of the existing Snowy Mountains Scheme, facing significant cost blowouts and delays. It involves extensive tunnelling and underground construction.
rows.opportunityNote: The project is nearing completion, but its scale and complexity, particularly the extensive tunnelling, suggest ongoing needs for portable air, dewatering, and power generation for maintenance, finish
rows.contactList: Joshua C. | procurement @ Snowy Hydro Limited~~Don Tay | procurement @ Snowy Hydro Limited~~Lahiru Wijesundara | engineering @ Snowy Hydro Limited
